title: Black (disambiguation)
content:
'''Black''' can refer to the following:
[[File:Char-stub.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] infamous black [[Darth Vader's armor/Legends|armor]]]]
